svg.title: Kubernetes NetworkPolicy Inventory
svg.desc: Overview, connection graph, and per-namespace inventory of live Kubernetes NetworkPolicy objects.
svg.text: Context: default | Generated: 2026-03-11 13:46 Central Europe Standard Time | Namespaces: 31 | Policies: 229
Namespace-level directed flows aggregated from policy peers. Sources are on the left, targets are on the right.
